description_long: This bonsai features a lush, dense canopy of green leaves, creating a full and vibrant appearance. The foliage is supported by a network of visible, intricately branched trunks and stems, which emerge from a rectangular, earth-toned pot. The pot sits on a textured, square base that resembles a tiled or paved surface, suggesting a deliberate and stable display. The leaves are broad and closely packed, forming a rounded silhouette that nearly obscures the trunk from some angles. The overall impression is of a well-maintained, mature bonsai, suitable for prominent display in an urban park or garden setting.
description: A dense, leafy bonsai with a rounded canopy and visible branching, planted in a rectangular pot on a tiled base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dense foliage and partial visibility of the trunk, with the rectangular pot and tiled base clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the fullness of the canopy, with the leaves extending outward and the trunk mostly hidden.
description_view_2: The back view reveals more of the trunk structure beneath the dense foliage, with the pot and base still visible.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the rounded, lush canopy and the rectangular pot beneath.
attribute_pot_type: Rectangular, ceramic pot in a muted brown color, with a simple, unadorned design and a flat rim.
attribute_trunk_curvature: The trunk is gently curved with multiple visible bends, following an informal upright style with naturalistic movement.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Branches are densely arranged in a radial and somewhat layered pattern, creating a rounded, full silhouette with overlapping foliage.
attribute_leaf_density: Dense; the foliage is lush and thick, with minimal gaps, giving the bonsai a very full appearance throughout.
